tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: We Are Never Ever Getting Back Together

content:
I've seen a few versions out there, but I think I have it down (not perfect, but 
it sounds great). If anyone could assist with the bridge that begins with "I don't 
care what people say...", that would be lovely.

Capo VI

Intro:

[ch]C[/ch] [ch]G6[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] (basically, the progression for the whole song)

Verse 1:

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]G6[/ch]
Maybe I need some rehab, [/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
Or maybe just need some sleep[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
I've got a sick obsession,[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F[/ch]     
I'm seeing it in my dreams[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]G6[/ch]
I'm looking down every alley,[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]  
I'm making those desperate calls[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]
I'm staying up all night hoping,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
Hit my head against the walls[/tab]

Bridge:

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G6[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]
What you've got boy is hard to find[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]    
Think about it all the time[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G6[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
I'm all strung up my heart is fried[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
I just cant get you off my mind[/tab]

Chorus:
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]G6[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]
Because your love, your love, your love, is my drug[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
Your love your love your love[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]G6[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]
I said your love, your love, your love, is my drug[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
Your love your love your love[/tab]

Verse 2:
Won't listen to any advice, mamma's telling me to think twice
But left to my own devices i'm addicted its a crisis!

My friends think I've gone crazy, my judgment is getting kinda hazy
My status is gonna be affected if I keep it up like a love sick crackhead

Bridge 1:
What you've got boy is hard to find
Think about it all about it all the time
I'm all strung up my heart is fried
I just cant get you off my mind

Chorus:
Because your love, your love, your love, is my drug
Your love your love your love
I said your love, your love, your love, is my drug
Your love your love your love

Bridge 2 (single strum each chord):

[tab][ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]G6[/ch]
I don't care what people say[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]             
The rush is worth the price I pay[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]G6[/ch]
I get so high when you're with me[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
But crash and crave you when you leave[/tab]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]
So I got a question;[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G6[/ch]
Do you want to have a summer party in my basement?[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]                              
Do I make your heart beat like an 808 drum?[/tab]

Is my love, your drug?
[tab]  [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]              
(huh) Your drug? (huh) your drug? (huh) your drug?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Is my love, your drug?[/tab]

Chorus: 
Because your love, your love, your love, is my drug
Your love your love your love
I said your love, your love, your love, is my drug
Your love your love your love (x2)

Fade out

Heyyy heyyy your love, your love,your love,your love, (whispered) is my drug
I like your beard



---I welcome all suggestions! Thanks guys---
